["Around 18-19 I think Elderstone is great","You can start dipping into the Braxonian Desert around then.","The Hidden Church in Blacksalt has great loot for your range.","I started messing around in Malaroth Nesting Grounds around 20.","Lost Cellar is good, bring Elemental Resist though. ["Rockshade is great for early 20s, but bring some resists. They hurt. It's by the tower in Windwashed. ["There are class sets of armor for basically everyone there. It's a huge power jump.","You can farm some really good armor there. ["You need it to be raining.  There's a quest in zone you can do to make it rain. Try farming the little village by the ocean for a bit. ","You need a Tempestalia to make it rain. ["In Braxonia there's a book that drops called Godless Amarion that explains almost everything. ","Find 'Godless Amarion' and read that. ["Prielian Cascade is in Windwashed on the south wall, by the bandit camp. It's a higher level place but really good xp. ","Priel Cascade is like level 30+ but it's a fun dungeon. ","Some really good loot comes out of Prielian Cascade, but it's a high 20s dungeon at least. It's near the waterfall in Windwashed. "]

["You farm the priests in the village by the ocean in Braxonian. He'll drop a stone and some instructions. Take the stone to Orion in Port Azure at the druid ring.
